recommendations.title: The Cyclone
recommendations.overview: The everyday life of accountant Levante, his family and the other people of a small town in the Tuscan countryside is taken by storm by the serendipitous arrival of five gorgeous Spanish flamenco dancers.

recommendations.title: It's Now or Never
recommendations.overview: Narrates the preparation for a wedding of a Spanish couple in which everything goes wrong.

recommendations.title: Música
recommendations.overview: A young man, plagued by the music in his head, has to come to terms with an uncertain future while balancing love, family and Brazilian culture in Newark, New Jersey.

recommendations.title: Guernica
recommendations.overview: The fates of Henry - an American correspondent - and Teresa, one of the Republic's censors during the Spanish Civil War.

recommendations.title: Dawn Breaks, Which Is No Small Thing
recommendations.overview: Teodoro, a Spanish engineer working as a professor in the United States, returns to Spain to enjoy a sabbatical year.
